answer: June 12 net margin was overstated because the pricing shadow ledger duplicated promotional adjustments by joining on `sku` instead of `order_line_id`; roll back `ff-2026-06-pricing-shadow-ledger` and rebuild `margin_daily` from deduplicated order-line rows.

facts.remediation: roll back `ff-2026-06-pricing-shadow-ledger` and rebuild `margin_daily` from `order_line_id`-deduplicated order line ledger rows
facts.root_cause: pricing shadow ledger duplicated promotional adjustments via a `sku` join instead of `order_line_id`
